results.title: Big blow for India! Virat Kohli ruled out of Afghanistan ODI series with hamstring injury: Report
results.description: Virat Kohli has been ruled out of India's ODI series against Afghanistan due to a hamstring injury. The India star recently guided RCB to the IPL 2026 title, while Rohit Sharma's fitness remains under scrutiny ahead of the three-match series

results.title: Two detained, trekking agency under lens: Heads roll after MBA student goes missing on Uttarakhand trek
results.description: The role of a trekking agency has come under scanner in Uttarakhand's Uttarkashi after a 23-year-old MBA student went missing last month, said officials on Wednesday. The missing student, identified as Babita Pandey, had gone for a trek with two of her friends, who now have been detained.
